education_institutions_agencies.name: Education Institutions & Agencies
education_institutions_agencies.description: Government agencies, boards, and regulatory bodies overseeing education in Nigeria, including the National Universities Commission (NUC), Universal Basic Education Commission (UBEC), TETFund, JAMB, WAEC, NECO, and SUBEB. Also includes discussions about specific universities, polytechnics, colleges of education, and unity schools.

education_policies_frameworks.name: Education Policies & Frameworks
education_policies_frameworks.description: Educational laws, acts, policies, and regulatory frameworks governing the Nigerian education sector. Includes the National Policy on Education, education funding acts, university autonomy bills, student loan policies, and government white papers on education reform.

education_programs_initiatives.name: Education Programs & Initiatives
education_programs_initiatives.description: Government-led educational programs, intervention schemes, and scholarship initiatives. Includes the Almajiri Education Programme, Safe School Initiative, Home Grown School Feeding Programme, BESDA (Better Education Service Delivery for All), and various federal and state scholarship boards.

exams_assessments.name: Exams & Assessments
exams_assessments.description: Standardized testing, entrance examinations, and academic assessments in Nigeria. Covers UTME, POST-UTME, WASSCE, NECO, NABTEB, Common Entrance Examination, and issues related to exam malpractice, result releases, and cut-off marks.

education_levels_school_types.name: Education Levels & School Types
education_levels_school_types.description: Discussions specific to different tiers of the education system: Early Childhood Care and Development (ECCD), Primary Education, Secondary Education (JSS/SSS), Tertiary Education, Vocational/Technical Education, and Special Needs Education.

curriculum_academics.name: Curriculum & Academics
curriculum_academics.description: The content of education, teaching standards, syllabus, and academic subjects. Includes discussions on STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, Math), entrepreneurship education, indigenous language teaching, and curriculum updates by NERDC.

education_stakeholders_roles.name: Education Stakeholders & Roles
education_stakeholders_roles.description: Key actors in the education sector including students, teachers, lecturers, Vice-Chancellors, Rectors, parents, and unions like ASUU (Academic Staff Union of Universities), NUT (Nigeria Union of Teachers), NASU, and SSANU. Covers strikes, salary disputes, and welfare.

education_geography_administration.name: Education Geography & Administration
education_geography_administration.description: Administrative structures and geographic distribution of education. Includes Local Government Education Authorities (LGEA), State Universal Basic Education Boards (SUBEB), school districts, catchment areas, and educationally disadvantaged states (EDS).
